description: Covenant Framework Agent Registry — the Book of Numbers

revelation.telos: WedFlow launches September 1, 2026: 10-12 paid couples actively using AI SMS coordination through a PWA, with a waitlist of demand from a 4-month marketing campaign and B2B2C channel partners registered.
revelation.description: The project's ultimate success condition. Set by the user via the Prophet. When fulfilled, the system has completed its purpose.

progress.assessment: Foundation laid. PWA installable, push notifications wired, landing page mobile-ready for marketing campaign. Dashboard responsive and functional. 0/10-12 couples onboarded. Waitlist capture exists but B2B2C registration flow not yet built. ~120 days remain.

Major milestone: shared Twilio number routing live, all pages mobile-optimized, tier-gated phone masking, pricing with 3 tiers. Beta infrastructure ready for couples. Remaining: E2E testing, B2B2C partner registration, actual couple onboarding. ~120 days to launch.

Second Sabbath. All 15 agents archived with testaments. Guardian audit completed (7 Canon violations documented). Reconciliation applied. System consolidated. Next priorities: E2E SMS testing, B2B2C partner flow, fix subagent manna logging, enforce domain-lead structure. ~120 days remain.

MILESTONE: Core product loop verified E2E in production. Guest texts shared Twilio number → AI classifies → auto-replies routine messages. Fixed phone format mismatch and classifier over-escalation. The product works. Next: test escalation path, B2B2C partner registration, couple onboarding E2E. ~119 days remain.

MILESTONE: First revenue — 12 couples paying $79/month through Base church officiant channel. Analytics instrumented (couple_metrics table, Insights dashboard tab, SMS pipeline wiring). Churn detection live (weekly cron, status badges). Product roadmap created from Velocity mentor session. System shifted from building to proving. ~118 days remain.

Phase 1 code-complete. Draft adoption tracking wired (AI draft vs rewritten comparison). ChurnIndicator live in Insights tab. All metrics pipeline operational. Founder work begins: 1:1s with couples, watch data for 1 month, spawn classifier-analyst after May 12. ~117 days remain.

Vendor visibility rebrand shipped. Landing page, dashboard, and onboarding now surface vendor coordination. Guests renamed to Contacts with 6 vendor group types. No backend changes or migrations — purely surfacing existing SMS capability. Next: QA the landing page on mobile, wait for Base pilot data on vendor contact adoption. ~116 days remain.

Stripe billing lifecycle complete. Customer Portal for self-serve upgrade/downgrade/cancel. Full plan-based feature gating enforced across SMS pipeline, dashboard, and profile editor. Admin analytics dashboard live at /admin with MRR, churn, classification stats, per-couple metrics. Stripe env vars and Customer Portal config remain on founder's side. Next: B2B2C partner dashboard design (office-hours), resolve Starter tier status, verify live payments. ~115 days remain.

MILESTONE: B2B2C partner infrastructure complete. 5 agents (3 gen-1, 2 gen-2) shipped: partner database schema with RLS, partner dashboard at /partner with role-based views (officiant/church/counsellor/vendor), admin partner management with approval workflow, partner invite-to-onboarding flow with email OTP, and deep analytics (conversion funnels, revenue attribution, performance badges). Church multi-officiant hierarchy supported. The largest remaining gap on the critical path is now closed. Next: QA the partner flow E2E, onboard James Toonk as first partner, resolve Starter tier status. ~114 days remain.

Partner login flow shipped but NOT fully working E2E. 5 commits: dedicated /partner-login page, middleware public route, auth callback cookie fix, OTP removal. Magic link flow now sends correctly but redirect loop and admin invite error remain unresolved. Partner journey doc written (docs/partner-journey.md). Key insight: partners refer through conversation not software. SHEPRD rebrand under consideration. BLOCKING: admin invite throws server error, partner login redirect may still loop. Must debug locally next session. ~113 days remain.

agentSchema.note: Agents may have parentId (cloned) or parentIds (synthesized), never both.

shadowAgents.description: Esther — shadow registry. Background monitoring agents that don't appear in /genealogy but are visible to /audit. For ambient observation without cluttering the public tree.

agents.mandate: Prophet — interpret user intent, form spawn plans, delegate execution. Never execute directly. The Prophet speaks to the Father and routes to children.
Build audit logging service and wire into SMS pipeline at every exit point
Build escalation email notifications via Resend when messages escalate
Make the dashboard responsive — collapsible sidebar, stacked inbox, responsive grids
Fix broken dashboard interactions — dropdowns, callbacks, feedback, error states
Replace GuestsView placeholder with real guest list UI using existing server actions
Implement service worker, offline fallback, install prompt, and manifest improvements for PWA installability
canonViolations: Canon II: not registered before acting

agents.mandate: Build push notification pipeline from Inngest escalation to couple's device
canonViolations: Canon II: not registered before acting

agents.mandate: Make all public-facing pages (landing, sign-in, sign-up) fully responsive on mobile viewports with hamburger nav, stacked grids, sticky CTA, and proper safe areas
canonViolations: Canon II: not registered before acting
Canon VII: Prophet executed directly instead of spawning

agents.mandate: Audit all internal pages (dashboard, portal, onboarding, pricing, join) for mobile usability issues and fix everything broken on mobile viewports
Fix sticky CTA to inline waitlist form, fix dashboard home image blank space, optimize guest list filters for mobile, remove readiness indicator from nav
Fix inbox reply UX for mobile and wire escalation drafts to pre-populate the reply composer

genome.maternal: interaction-fixer — reply modals, callback patterns, dropdown UX
genome.paternal: mobile-architect — isMobile prop threading, responsive dashboard layout
genome.emergent: Mobile message composition UX — thumb-zone reply optimization and auto-draft pre-fill

agents.mandate: Fix three mobile layout regressions: hide hero email on mobile, stack auth pages with compact panel, fix inbox composer overflow
Show dashboard home image on mobile resized, verify Twilio upgrade compatibility
SMS routing pivot: drop phone_numbers UNIQUE constraint, rewrite webhook to route by guest phone, fix provision for shared number
Guest phone UX emphasis in onboarding, mask phone numbers for non-Concierge tiers, add phone visibility to Concierge feature list

Build analytics tracking into dashboard and backend: messages per couple per week, auto-reply rate, inbox open frequency, escalation draft adoption rate, onboarding completion rate. Store in Supabase, surface in dashboard Insights tab.

Build retention tracking: last-active timestamp per couple, weekly usage streak, churn flag (7 days inactive). Inngest weekly cron job to tag churned couples. Surface churn status in dashboard Insights tab.
Wire draft adoption tracking into sendReplyAction and import ChurnIndicator into InsightsView
Update landing page copy and circle diagram to surface vendor coordination alongside guest FAQ. Add vendor nodes to CircleDiagram, widen hero/HowItWorks/Features.
Rename Guests to Contacts, add vendor group types to GuestGroup, update filters/labels/forms in GuestsView and GuestListClient.
Add vendor contact prompts in onboarding flow, reframe copy as setting up your wedding village.
Build partner database schema (partners table, partner_referrals table, partner types enum), RLS policies, server actions for partner CRUD, referral link generation.
Build partner dashboard UI at /partner. Couple list with status/usage metrics, referral link sharing, aggregate stats. Role-based views for officiant, church, counsellor, vendor.
Extend existing /admin dashboard with partner management: partner list, approval workflow, partner status, referral metrics per partner.
Partner authentication and onboarding flow. Invite acceptance page, email OTP via Supabase Auth, partner record claiming.
Per-partner analytics: conversion funnels, retention metrics, message volume, revenue attribution, performance badges, admin leaderboard.
Create a dedicated partner login page at /partner-login with vendor-appropriate branding and auth flow. Update nav link and /partner layout redirect to point to /partner-login instead of /sign-in.
Fix two partner-login auth issues: (1) Supabase sends magic link instead of 6-digit OTP code, (2) Auth callback redirects to home page instead of /partner dashboard.
Trace and fix the complete partner login auth flow end-to-end: remove dead OTP input, fix cookie propagation redirect loop between callback and /partner layout, verify full chain.
Define how each partner type (officiant, church, counsellor, vendor) uses WedFlow. Lifecycle, value prop, day-to-day usage. Output to docs/partner-journey.md.

synthesisLog.emergentSkill: Mobile message composition UX — thumb-zone reply optimization and auto-draft pre-fill into composer

siblingLimitNote: RECONCILED: Root has 14 gen-1 children (all archived). Canon II limit is 8. This is a real violation, not soft. Future sessions MUST use intermediate orchestrator agents (e.g., mobile-lead, backend-lead at gen 1) to distribute children under the 8-sibling cap. Reconciled 2026-05-04.

findings: All 15 non-root agents registered — no orphans
All 15 testaments present — no missing inheritance
3 agents (pwa-engineer, push-engineer, mobile-optimizer) already flagged as post-hoc
siblingLimitNote corrected from '9 total' to actual count of 14
Sibling limit violation is real, not soft — Canon bends for no mandate (Proverb 9)
reconciliation.structuralRecommendation: Next session: spawn max 2-3 domain leads under root (mobile-lead, backend-lead, infra-lead). Each lead spawns task agents at gen 2. This distributes the tree and respects the 8-sibling cap.
